footer.description: Prefabricated concrete construction solutions built for durability, precision, and efficient delivery.

meta.title: BUILDING THE FUTURE
meta.description: High-quality prefabricated concrete systems for faster, cleaner, and more predictable construction.

hero.description: High-quality prefabricated concrete systems for faster, cleaner, and more predictable construction.

intro.title: Industrialized construction with architectural discipline.
intro.description: Nikolman brings design, engineering, production, and installation into one coordinated process for residential, commercial, and institutional building programs.

products.title: Precast and modular solutions
products.description: The remade structure organizes Nikolman's core products into clear, scan-friendly service cards with direct paths to technical consultation.

precastStandard.title: Precast Standard Products
precastStandard.description: Nikolman concrete prefabricated element facility offer a wide variety of quality precast concrete for use in the construction and utility markets within Georgia. Each of Nikolman's Standard Products are fabricated to Georgian construction quality requirements and full QC documentation is available.

wallPanels.title: Precast Concrete Wall Panels
wallPanels.description: Precast concrete structural system offers tremendous advantages and value for residential and commercial buildings. The use of PC structures makes an ideal framework for creating a design that offers fast construction and structural stability. A wide range of options are available for creating the perfect system to achieve the size and shape of building required.

customStructures.title: Custom Concrete Precast Structures
customStructures.description: Architectural precast concrete panels currently offered by Nikolman include a variety of shapes and finishes are available. Various materials may be cast on the face of panels to supplement the colors and textures attainable with exposed aggregate finishes including natural stone and clay masonry, giving a unique precast exterior or interior finish.

pilingDrainage.title: Piling and Foundation Drainage Systems
pilingDrainage.description: Foundation drainage and hydroisolation systems help protect building structures from water exposure and support durable construction below and around the structural base.

modularStructures.title: Modular Structures
modularStructures.description: Factory-produced concrete modules and assemblies that reduce site work and support rapid delivery of repeatable building programs.

singleFamily.title: Single Family Homes
singleFamily.description: Durable prefabricated building systems for private houses, combining structural reliability with shorter construction timelines.

townhouses.title: Townhouses
townhouses.description: Repeatable precast and modular assemblies for multi-unit residential blocks where speed, consistency, and cost control matter.

officeBuildings.title: Office Buildings
officeBuildings.description: Concrete structural systems for offices and mixed-use workspaces, planned for efficient spans, services, and long-term adaptability.

medicalFacilities.title: Medical Facilities
medicalFacilities.description: Reliable precast solutions for clinics and healthcare facilities with careful attention to durability, access, and phased construction.

why.title: A controlled process from engineering to installation.
why.description: Factory precision, disciplined planning, and coordinated site work help each project move with less uncertainty.

factoryPrecision.title: Factory precision
factoryPrecision.body: Elements are produced in controlled conditions, improving dimensional accuracy and finish consistency.

fasterConstruction.title: Faster construction
fasterConstruction.body: Parallel factory production and site preparation shorten delivery schedules and reduce weather exposure.

costEfficiency.title: Cost efficiency
costEfficiency.body: Standardized processes reduce waste, rework, and unpredictable labor time on site.

fullCycle.title: Full-cycle coordination
fullCycle.body: Design, production, transport, and installation are considered together from the earliest planning stages.

cta.title: Bring us your drawings, concept, or site challenge.
cta.description: Nikolman can help determine the right precast or modular approach for your project scope.

meta.title: Prefab structures
meta.description: Explore Nikolman's precast standard products, wall panels, custom structures, modular structures, and building applications.

hero.title: Concrete systems for repeatable quality and rapid assembly.
hero.description: Explore Nikolman's precast standard products, wall panels, custom structures, modular structures, and building applications.

categories.title: Product families
categories.description: Each family is organized around the same goal: reliable concrete elements, manufactured with control and delivered ready for installation.

standard.title: Precast Standard Products
standard.subtitle: Catalog production
standard.description: Standard products provide a dependable base for common structural and site requirements. They are suited to projects that need proven dimensions, repeatable quality, and fast procurement.

wallPanels.title: Precast Wall Panels
wallPanels.subtitle: Building envelope
wallPanels.description: Wall panels support quick enclosure and consistent exterior or interior wall quality. They can be planned for openings, insulation needs, and coordinated site installation.

custom.title: Custom Structures
custom.subtitle: Engineered to project
custom.description: Custom structures are developed around specific project geometry, loading, and architectural requirements when standard elements are not enough.

modular.title: Modular Structures
modular.subtitle: Repeatable assemblies
modular.description: Modular structures use factory-built concrete assemblies to reduce site work and support faster, more predictable project delivery.

buildingTypes.title: Built for different project types
buildingTypes.description: The same production discipline can be adapted to houses, townhouses, offices, and medical facilities.

singleFamily.title: Single Family Homes
singleFamily.description: Prefabricated concrete systems for durable private homes with cleaner site logistics.

townhouses.title: Townhouses
townhouses.description: Repeatable structural systems for row housing and compact residential communities.

officeBuildings.title: Office Buildings
officeBuildings.description: Concrete components for flexible office plans and commercial building programs.

medicalFacilities.title: Medical Facilities
medicalFacilities.description: Reliable precast systems for clinics, healthcare extensions, and public-use facilities.

cta.title: Need technical guidance for a prefab project?
cta.description: Share the drawings, target schedule, and site requirements with Nikolman's team.

industrialPlant.title: Precast industrial production shell
industrialPlant.description: A factory shell planned around precast wall panels, structural concrete elements, and clean logistics for fast installation.

residentialBlock.title: Residential precast building system
residentialBlock.description: A repeatable housing structure using factory-made concrete elements to reduce on-site work and stabilize construction timing.
residentialBlock.scope: Structural shell, stair elements, facade-ready panels

commercialFacade.title: Commercial wall panel package
commercialFacade.description: Architectural and structural concrete wall panels prepared for a clean commercial exterior and efficient enclosure sequence.

medicalExtension.title: Medical facility extension
medicalExtension.description: A phased institutional extension using precast components to maintain predictable site access and disciplined delivery.

submit.title: Newly completed work can be added as the portfolio grows.
submit.description: Project photos, location, year, delivery status, technical scope, and a short case description are ready to sit inside the same visual system.

meta.title: Newsroom
meta.description: Project news, production milestones, company updates, and technical stories from Nikolman's concrete construction environment.

hero.title: Welcome to the Nikolman newsroom.
hero.description: Project news, production milestones, company updates, and technical stories from Nikolman's concrete construction environment.

intro.title: Stories from production, projects, and the people behind the concrete.
intro.description: Use the newsroom filters to browse company updates, project news, press releases, and technical notes without leaving the Nikolman website.

labels.noResults: No newsroom entries match the selected filters.

projectArchiveLaunch.title: Nikolman prepares a dedicated completed projects archive
projectArchiveLaunch.summary: The portfolio structure brings project references, photos, scope information, and delivery notes into one clear section.
projectArchiveLaunch.body: The new project archive is designed for completed buildings, production milestones, and detailed case studies. Each entry can carry a hero image, category, location, year, project status, and technical scope, giving visitors a clearer view of Nikolman's construction capability.

factoryQualityProcess.title: Factory-controlled production supports predictable project delivery
factoryQualityProcess.summary: Controlled production conditions help improve dimensional accuracy, surface quality, and installation readiness.
factoryQualityProcess.body: Nikolman's prefabricated concrete process is built around repeatable production, engineering-led detailing, and quality checks before delivery. This reduces uncertainty on site and helps project teams plan installation with greater confidence.

teamGrowth.title: Nikolman expands its construction and production capacity
teamGrowth.summary: The company continues strengthening its team and delivery structure for larger precast and modular programs.
teamGrowth.body: With a growing employee base and a wider project portfolio, Nikolman is preparing for more complex industrial, residential, commercial, and institutional work. The focus remains on disciplined planning, durable concrete systems, and coordinated execution.

precastDeliveryMilestone.title: Precast delivery milestone reached on active building program
precastDeliveryMilestone.summary: A coordinated delivery sequence keeps structural elements moving from production to site with fewer delays.
precastDeliveryMilestone.body: The milestone highlights the value of connecting production planning, transport logistics, and installation sequencing early in the project. This coordinated approach supports cleaner site work and a more reliable construction schedule.

modularPlanningGuide.title: Planning modular concrete systems before the site opens
modularPlanningGuide.summary: Early coordination of geometry, transport, and lifting strategy helps modular programs move with fewer interruptions.
modularPlanningGuide.body: Nikolman's modular planning process connects engineering decisions with production and site logistics. When the project team aligns openings, connection points, delivery routes, and installation zones early, the construction sequence becomes more controlled and easier to scale.

wallPanelProgram.title: Wall panel program prepared for a residential development
wallPanelProgram.summary: A repeatable wall panel package supports cleaner scheduling for a residential construction program.
wallPanelProgram.body: The wall panel program is structured around repeatable dimensions, planned openings, and coordinated delivery groups. This helps the site team close building sections faster while preserving the precision expected from factory-made concrete elements.

mediacenter.title: Images, documents, and press material in one place.
mediacenter.description: Browse production and project photography or download company documents and press packs. Filter the library by media type as the archive grows.
mediacenter.empty: No media in this category yet.

pressContacts.title: Talk to the Nikolman press team.
pressContacts.description: For interviews, project information, imagery, or media partnerships, reach the team directly or send a media request through the contact form.

pressOffice.description: Press releases, company statements, and project news for Nikolman's prefabricated concrete construction work.

mediaPartnerships.description: Image and document requests, interview scheduling, and collaboration on construction and production stories.

meta.title: Who we are
meta.description: Nikolman develops prefabricated concrete solutions that help projects become more predictable, durable, and efficient.

hero.title: A construction partner focused on precision concrete.
hero.description: Nikolman develops prefabricated concrete solutions that help projects become more predictable, durable, and efficient.

story.title: Nikolman combines engineering focus with production discipline.
story.p1: Nikolman works in prefabricated concrete construction, producing elements and structures that are designed for efficient assembly and long service life.
story.p2: The company supports projects through coordinated thinking: from concept and technical planning to factory production, delivery, and installation.
story.p3: Its core offer covers precast standard products, wall panels, custom concrete structures, modular structures, and building systems for residential, office, and medical facilities.

mission.label: Mission
mission.text: To make concrete construction faster, cleaner, and more reliable through factory-made precision and responsible project coordination.

vision.label: Vision
vision.text: To become a trusted regional partner for prefabricated concrete buildings and modular construction systems.

precision.title: Precision
precision.description: Accurate production and installation details support reliable results on site.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.description: Durable materials and controlled processes help buildings perform over time.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Modern prefab methods create new opportunities for speed and quality.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.description: Clear coordination with clients, designers, and contractors keeps projects moving.

quality.title: Controlled production, disciplined delivery.
quality.description: Nikolman's work is shaped by careful material selection, repeatable factory processes, and practical construction planning.

meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.description: Learn how Nikolman collects, uses, stores, and protects personal information submitted through this website.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.description: How Nikolman handles personal information submitted through this website.

summary.title: Your information, handled responsibly.
summary.description: We collect only the information needed to answer enquiries, operate the website, and send updates you expressly request.

intro.p1: This policy explains how Nikolman collects and processes personal information when you visit this website, send a project enquiry, subscribe to newsroom updates, or use the administration area as an authorised user.
intro.p2: By using the website, you acknowledge the practices described below. Where processing relies on consent, you may withdraw that consent at any time.

collection.title: 1. Information we collect
collection.body: The information collected depends on how you use the website.
items: Contact enquiries: name, email address, optional phone number, enquiry subject, message, language, and submission time.
Newsletter subscriptions: email address, preferred language, consent date, consent source, and privacy-policy version.
Authorised administration: account identity, authentication cookies, role, and security-related session information.
Technical information automatically processed by hosting and security providers, such as IP address, browser details, request time, and diagnostic logs.

purposes.title: 2. How we use information
purposes.body: We use personal information only for defined business and website purposes.
items: To review and respond to project, product, partnership, or media enquiries.
To send company and newsroom updates requested by subscribers.
To operate, secure, troubleshoot, and improve the website and administration area.
To prevent spam, fraud, misuse, and unauthorised access.
To meet applicable legal, accounting, or regulatory obligations.

legalBases.title: 3. Grounds for processing
legalBases.body: Contact enquiries are processed to take steps at your request, pursue Nikolman's legitimate business interests in responding to enquiries, and comply with legal obligations where applicable. Newsletter messages are based on your explicit consent, which you can withdraw at any time.

sharing.title: 4. Service providers and transfers
sharing.body: Nikolman does not sell personal information. Data may be processed by trusted technology providers that help operate the website, including Vercel for hosting and delivery and Supabase for database, storage, and authentication services. These providers may process data in other countries under their contractual and technical safeguards. Information may also be disclosed when required by law or necessary to protect legal rights.

retention.title: 5. How long we keep information
retention.body: We keep personal information only for as long as reasonably necessary for its purpose.
items: Contact enquiries are normally retained for up to 24 months after the last relevant communication, unless a longer period is needed for an active project, contract, dispute, or legal requirement.
Newsletter records are retained until you withdraw consent or request deletion.
Authorised administrator records are retained while access is active and as needed for security and accountability.
Provider logs and backups may remain temporarily according to the providers' security and backup cycles.

rights.title: 6. Your choices and rights
rights.body: Subject to applicable law, you may ask whether we hold your personal information and request access, correction, deletion, restriction, or a copy of it. You may object to certain processing and may withdraw newsletter consent at any time. We may need to verify your identity before completing a request.

security.title: 7. Security
security.body: We use reasonable technical and organisational safeguards, including encrypted HTTPS connections, access controls, role-based administration, database row-level security, input validation, request limits, and restricted storage access. No internet service can guarantee absolute security, so authorised users should use unique, strong passwords and keep credentials confidential.

cookies.title: 8. Cookies and analytics
cookies.body: The public website currently does not use advertising or behavioural analytics cookies. Essential authentication cookies are used for authorised administrators to maintain secure sessions. If optional analytics or marketing tools are added later, this policy and any required consent controls will be updated before those tools are enabled.

changes.title: 9. Policy changes
changes.body: We may update this policy when the website, our services, or legal requirements change. The latest version and its update date will always be published on this page.

contact.title: 10. Privacy requests
contact.body: To exercise your rights, withdraw newsletter consent, or ask a privacy question, contact Nikolman through the website contact page or by phone. Please identify the email address connected with your request so we can locate the correct record.
